# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Stay informed with ABC News 88, Portsmouth Virginia&#39;s premier source for live news broadcasting, local weather radar, and VDOT traffic updates. Watch us on Cox Cable and mobile.

### Live Coverage
https://example.com/live
Experience live news broadcasting as it happens with ABC News 88&#39;s teleprompter-equipped cameras covering Portsmouth and surrounding areas. Stream now on any device.

### Weather & VDOT Traffic
https://example.com/weather-traffic
Get accurate local weather radar forecasts and live VDOT traffic updates for Portsmouth Virginia. The weather channel live data keeps you prepared and on schedule daily.

### Community & Contact
https://example.com/contact
Join the ABC News 88 community in Portsmouth Virginia. Share news tips, request coverage, or reach our broadcast team. We&#39;re on your side and here to serve you.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
